title: dryopteris larutensis
intro: Dryopteris larutensis, also known as Larut Shield Fern, is a species of fern native to Malaysia. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The leaves and stems of the Larut Shield Fern can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
